summary.key_theme: AI 需求帶動長期成長前景與財報表現強勁，但面臨台積電技術路徑調整及地緣政治出口限制的潛在風險。

bullish.title: ASML Guidance Climbs As AI And Memory Orders Reshape Growth Outlook
bullish.reason: 公司上調 2026 年銷售展望，顯示 AI 與記憶體晶片製造商對先進微影設備需求強勁，為股價提供基本面支撐。

bullish.title: ASML (ASML) Upgraded to Buy: Here's Why
bullish.reason: 獲分析師調升評級至買入，反映市場對其獲利前景的樂觀情緒，強化了投資人信心。

bullish.title: ASML AGM: AI Boom Fuels Chip Tool Demand as 2026 Sales Outlook Rises and Buyback Tops €12B
bullish.reason: 股東大會確認 AI 需求強勁，且宣布高達 120 億歐元的股票回購計畫，直接提升股東價值。

bullish.title: ASML: Strong Play On The AI Boom
bullish.reason: 第一季財報表現亮眼，驗證了公司作為 AI 基礎設施關鍵供應商的市場地位。

bullish.title: 3 Monster Stocks to Hold for the Next 20 Years
bullish.reason: 長期投資觀點，將 ASML 列為具備護城河的長期持有標的。

bullish.title: ASML reports transactions under its current share buyback program
bullish.reason: 執行既定回購計畫，顯示管理層對公司現金流與未來股價的信心。

bullish.title: Is ASML (ASML) a Buy as Wall Street Analysts Look Optimistic?
bullish.reason: 華爾街平均經紀商建議（ABR）維持正面，顯示市場對其投資價值仍持肯定態度。

bullish.title: Here's How Much You Would Have Made Owning ASML Holding Stock In The Last 5 Years
bullish.reason: 回顧過去五年強勁表現，強化市場對其長期成長軌跡的認知。

bearish.title: Taiwan Semiconductor Snub Wipes $16 Billion Off ASML
bearish.reason: 台積電延遲採用高數值孔徑（High-NA）EUV 設備，直接衝擊市場對該高價產品的短期需求預期。

bearish.title: Taiwan Semi’s Latest Breakthrough Isn’t Just Bad for ASML Stock, It Could Disrupt the Entire Chip Industry
bearish.reason: 台積電 A13 與 N2U 製程可能繞過 ASML 的 4 億美元高價機台，引發市場對其技術壟斷地位的擔憂。

bearish.title: Why ASML Holdings Fell Today
bearish.reason: 受 OpenAI 成長放緩擔憂影響，導致半導體設備類股集體回調，顯示市場對 AI 泡沫的敏感度提高。

bearish.title: The MATCH Act Could Blow a Hole in ASML's Revenue. Here's What Investors Need to Know.
bearish.reason: 出口限制法案可能影響營收，地緣政治風險持續成為壓抑股價的潛在因素。

neutral.title: ASML: The Question Is Whether Its Monopoly Can Outrun Its Premium Valuation
neutral.reason: 探討壟斷地位與高估值之間的平衡，屬於中性觀點，未給出明確買賣建議。

neutral.title: ASML: Potential Bull Trap As AI Super Cycle Continues - Reiterate Hold
neutral.reason: 給予「持有」評級，認為雖然受益於 AI 趨勢，但估值已反映預期，存在多頭陷阱風險。

neutral.title: Is It Too Late To Consider ASML Holding After 117% One Year Surge?
neutral.reason: 針對股價一年內大漲後的估值合理性進行討論，未有明確方向性結論。

neutral.title: ASML Holding N.V. (ASML) Shareholder/Analyst Call - Slideshow
neutral.reason: 僅為公司法說會簡報資料，提供資訊透明度，無直接情緒導向。
